description: Use this API to calculate interchange limits of a study system against two opposing systems using a linear network (dc) model. This API routine was first introduced in release 29.0.0. ierr = poly(options, values, labels, dfxfile, resfile)
python_syntax: ierr = poly(options, values, labels, dfxfile, resfile)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of fifteen elements specifying calculation and reporting options. (input).

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: An array of six elements specifying tolerances and thresholds. (input).

parameters.name: labels
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying subsystem labels. (input).

parameters.name: dfxfile
parameters.description: Name of dfax data file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: resfile
parameters.description: Name of poly results file. (input; no default allowed).

options.description: base case rating set (rating set program option setting by default).
contingency case rating set (rating set program option setting by default).
base case line flow code (0 by default).
locked in base case shift solutions.
regulating in base case shift solutions.
code for the treatment of base case line flow constraints in contingency cases (0 by default).
list study system buses (0 by default).
list opposing system buses (0 by default).
list study system tie lines (0 by default).
add study system tie lines to monitored line list (0 by default).
convert MVA ratings to estimated MW ratings (0 by default).
discontinue activity if MW mismatch exceeds VALUES(1) (0 by default).
option for plotting constraints (0 by default).
plot only constraints forming the boundary of the feasible region.

values.description: required MW mismatch tolerance for continuing (Newton solution convergence tolerance, TOLN, by default).
percent of rating for reporting an element as overloaded (100.0 by default).
maximum opposing system generation shift (10000.0 by default).
maximum opposing system delta interchange for plotting (1000.0 by default).
minimum distribution factor magnitude (0.0 by default).
study system generation shift (100.0 by default).

labels.description: first opposing system label (no default allowed).
second opposing system label (no default allowed).

error_codes.description: no error.
invalid OPTIONS value.
invalid VALUES value.
no Distribution Factor Data File specified.
same label specified for at least two subsystems.
no POLY Results Output File specified.
generators are converted.
buses in island(s) without a swing bus; use activity TREE.
largest mismatch exceeds mismatch tolerance.
error opening file DFXFILE.
file DFXFILE is not in the form of a PSSE-25 or later DFAX file; run DFAX.
file DFXFILE does not contain distribution factors; run DFAX with distribution factor option enabled.
no monitored branches or interfaces defined.
no subsystems defined.
subsystem not found.
specified subsystems overlap.
no in-service buses in subsystem WORLD.
no tie lines from study system.
only one subsystem defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
